fields.label: Type
fields.hint: CORE / SUPPORTING / EXTERNAL — the system's role in this process.

fields.label: Criticality
fields.hint: HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW — operational impact if the system is unavailable.

fields.label: Vendor
fields.hint: Vendor or build origin (e.g. Finastra Trade Innovation, SWIFT, in-house). Free text.

fields.label: Data Classification
fields.hint: confidential / restricted / internal / public — sensitivity of the data the system holds for this process.

fields.label: RTO
fields.hint: Recovery Time Objective — 1h / 4h / 8h / 24h. The DORA / ICT-mapping band.

fields.label: RPO
fields.hint: Recovery Point Objective — 0 / 15min / 1h / 4h. The DORA / ICT-mapping band.

template.heading: Role in this process
template.purpose: Which steps use the system and how.
